heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny. Highs in the low to mid 80s, except mid to upper 80s in southeastern valleys, and in the Hudson Valley. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Chance of a late-night shower in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley. Patchy valley fog east of the Greens. Lows from the upper 50s to mid 60s, some mid 50s northeast. Winds becoming light and variable, except south 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Wednesday
text: Patchy valley fog early east of the Greens. Otherwise partly to mostly cloudy, with scattered showers and thunderstorms, mainly in the afternoon. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s. South winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.
